completed_steps.summary: Classified project as a monolithic WeChat Mini Program frontend reference project.
Found README, deployment docx, generated BMAD docs, app/page/source files.
Identified tech stack: WeChat Mini Program, Vant Weapp, ECharts, custom REST API wrapper, WeChat plugin for locks.
Scanned key pages, API paths, order/payment/device/cleaning/admin flows.
Generated project documentation, product brief, and PRD draft.

findings.project_classification: Single WeChat Mini Program frontend for an unmanned chess/card room management system.
findings.technology_stack: Native WeChat Mini Program, Vant Weapp, ECharts, REST APIs, WeChat Pay, WeChat location/scan/login, lock plugin.

resume_instructions: Documentation scan complete. Continue with BMAD architecture or story creation using docs/index.md and _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/prd.md.
